free_text: Interplay of mean field and nucleon-nucleon
interactions in the production of Carbon fragments
in 16O induced reactions at incident energies
mounted in a 1.5 m diameter scattering chamber. Each
telescope consisted of a 25 mu-m thick Si surface
barrier dE detector, followed by a 2 mm thick Si
systematic error of the cross sections
The cross section production of 12C in 16O break-up
The cross section production of 12C in 16O break-up
